form_type.description: Free-text legal form of an entity (e.g., 'Limited Liability Company', 'Limited Partnership', 'Corporation'). Surfaced on conversion forms that capture the converting entity's form as a fillable field. Distinct from per-form-type-specific entity.is_lllp / entity.is_professional_llp boolean flags — entity.form_type is the human-readable form name as recited on the document.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction (state or country) governing the resulting entity's organic statute. Extends the conversion.new_entity.* namespace for forms where the resulting entity may be foreign (cf. MBCA-21 where resulting entity is always Maine and this field doesn't appear).

formation_date.description: Date the resulting entity is/will be organized under its governing law. Often coincides with conversion.effective_date (continuity claim) but captured separately because the form provides distinct widgets.

principal_office_address.description: Principal office address of the resulting entity (single combined widget; not split into street/city components).

effective_date.description: Date the conversion becomes legally effective under the resulting entity's governing statute. Distinct from conversion.future_effective_date (MBCA-21's optional future-effective election capped at 90 days) — conversion.effective_date is the actual effectiveness date and is always populated on this form.

line1.description: First address line for the foreign resulting entity's principal office, used for §1648.3 service-of-process appointment (Maine SOS becomes agent for service). Required when conversion.new_entity.jurisdiction is non-Maine; left blank otherwise.

line2.description: Second address line for the foreign resulting entity's principal office. Form provides two parallel widgets without enforcing a street/city split — synth typically writes street to line1 and city/state/zip to line2.

organizing_document_disposition.description: Enum identifying the SEVENTH-recital select-one for the resulting entity's organizing document: 'attached_as_exhibit' (Check Box3, paired with conversion.new_entity_provisions_exhibit_letter) | 'not_filing_with_sos' (Check Box5, applies when the resulting entity does not file organic documents with the Maine SOS, e.g., a general partnership or out-of-state entity). Mutually exclusive — exactly one is selected per the form's 'Select One' instruction.

converting_entity_name_and_form.description: Combined-recital widget at the signature block that recites the converting entity's name and form together (e.g., 'Acme LLC, a Maine limited liability company'). Synth derives from entity.name + entity.form_type at fill time. Combined-recital pattern parallels merger.surviving_entity.name_and_jurisdiction (MBCA-10) — single widget for a multi-concept recital.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
